title: Bridge Essay: Self-transcending meditation is good for mental health: why this should be the c

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Self-transcending, meditation, is, good, for.

**Self-transcending meditation is good for mental health: why this should be the case.** — Int Rev Psychiatry. PMID: 27329827. DOI: 10.1080/09540261.2016.1191449. Asimple theory of health has recently been proposed: while poor quality regulation corresponds to poor quality health so that improving regulation should improve health, optimal regulation optimizes function and optimizes health. Examining the term 'optimal regulation' in biological systems leads to astraightforward definition in terms of 'criticality' in complexity biology, aconcept that seems to apply universally throughout biology.
